_comment: ILLUSTRATIVE ONLY — shows the SHAPE of the artifact your agent should emit, not a required schema. A reviewer with no Revit must be able to open this and see, per element, what the agent decided, why, its confidence, and what it wrote (or why it abstained). Design your own.

decisions.matched_standard: Acoustic ceilings in open-plan office areas
decisions.how: inferred from category=Ceilings + room=Open Office (no product on the type)

chosen_product.name: Northwind Quietude 300
chosen_product.why: meets firm min NRC 0.80 and Class A; approved for open office

decisions.how: no firm standard covers interior partitions; catalog has no interior-partition category
decisions.note: Flagged for human review rather than guessing an acoustic product.

decisions.reason: category not covered by the firm library
